examples: My first name is Theodore, but I don't like it, for the fellows called me Dora, so I made them say Laurie instead.
Theodore and Franklin D. Roosevelt, William Howard Taft, Dwight D. Eisenhower, Lyndon B. Johnson, Gerald Ford, and George H. W. Bush all had offices in this building before becoming president.
According to Sam Theodore of Moody's, interest margins have begun to pick up this year.
Theodore Harper, an analyst at Frost Bank in Houston, recommends buying BP shares now.
